creator: martymac@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Alexander,

Here is a patch to update deskutils/gxneur to v.0.13.0.

This patch should be committed along with the update of deskutils/xneur (ports/157292).

If you agree with gxneur patch, I'll update both ports.

Would you approve the attached patch ?

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
